docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-09-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-09-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO:DEFENDANT - DENO, BRANDON;(ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NO SUCH NUMBER - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,080.00 FILED BY ELOUAFI, RADHOUANE AS TO DEFENDANT DENO, BRANDON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-09-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELOUAFI, RADHOUANE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DENO, BRANDON STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURN MAIL RE: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO DEFENDANT ENVELOPE MARKED: RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH NUMBER - UNABLE TO FORWARD
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - SERVED AUG-06-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DENO, BRANDON
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-09-2013 - JUDGMENT.
